name: jp.hidano.vtuber-system-base.stage-lighting-volume-tab
description: Display 1 UI tab for the VTuberSystemBase that controls stage selection, lighting (Directional/Point/Spot/Area lights with intensity, color, rotation, range, spot angle), URP Volume overrides, and a stage preview render texture, plus a JSON-backed preset store. Provides the Contracts assembly (IPC topic constants, DTOs, the StagePreviewHostLocator service abstraction, and preset persistence DTOs) shared between the UI side and the main-output-side StageLightingVolume adapter, plus the UI implementation that consumes the ui-toolkit-shell facades. The main-output-side adapter (Light/Volume/Stage driving and StagePreviewHost MonoBehaviour) is out of scope for this package.
